author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

NEW Ships Included in SAGE Labs

With the launch of SAGE Labs, we're including three ships to gain in-game, two of which that we'll NEVER SELL.

The three ships are:

 NEW: Fimbul BYOS Butch (Limited SAGE Labs Quantity)
The Butch will trample over challengers without letting you feel anything but the slightest bump... and maybe some panel rattling.

Don't let the overwhelming guns intimidate you. Inside, your crew can find a cozy environment inspired by spartan effectivity.
 NEW: Fimbul Mamba Ex (Will Never be Sold)Intimidation is a lot cheaper than ammunition.

When they rebuilt the Mamba into the Mamba Ex, Fimbul's goal was to remind your enemies that things might go better for them if they just raise their hands, instead of their weapons.
Calico Maxhog (Will Never be Sold)Built literally to get away from... everything we could think of.

The Maxhog marks Calico's sporty, aggressive entry into the proper civilian transport market. With its all-terain capabilities, it can drive, fly, and go underwater!
Ready to pilot one of these ships?

Prove your worth by playing SAGE Labs on September 21st, extracting resources, and earning them.  

 | https://labs.staratlas.com/
